* **IMMZD2DTTBEElements**

## Library: IMMZD2DTTBEElements 

| | |
| :--- | :--- |
| *Official URL*:http://smart.who.int/immunizations/Library/IMMZD2DTTBEElements | *Version*:0.2.0 |
| Draft as of 2026-04-03 | *Computable Name*:IMMZD2DTTBEElements |

 
This library defines context-independent elements for TBE used throughout the Immunization CPG
